sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79020" key="parafqegkth/ria" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρα-φθεγκτήρια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n79020.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">greeting</tr_> in the marriage festival, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:118" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.118</biblScope> </bibl> (v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
